pr.title: Non-record: BitNet b1.58 — 65M ternary params beat 4-hour baseline in 10 minutes (val_bpb=1.2029)

output.summary: BitNet b1.58 trains a 12-layer Chinchilla-scaled transformer with ternary BitLinear weights and base-3 packing to fit 64.5M params in 15MB.
techniques: Ternary BitLinear layers with STE and fp16 scale simulation
Base-3 packing yielding 1.6 bits per parameter
Chinchilla-driven scaling with Muon optimizer and warmdown schedule
